case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR VS. JACKEY'S ROOFING & CONSTRUCTION, INC A CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT JACKEY'S ROOFING & CONSTRUCTION, INC A CORPORATION DBA VIP ROOFING CO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
